name: Su_Ste_cluster_chrY
description: Suppressor of Stellate (Su(Ste)) tandem array on chrY heterochromatin. ~200 Stellate-homologous copies that produce piRNAs targeting the X Stellate cluster. Sequence identity to Stellate ~90%, divergent UTRs. Y-linked, male-specific; cry+ males carry functional Su(Ste); cry- males lose silencing.
